Who We Are

MORE THAN A CLUB

Holy Spikers Volleyball Club was born in Adeiso — a community where volleyball is more than a sport. It's a gathering, a culture, a reason to show up every day and get better.

We train hard, compete with pride, and welcome anyone with the heart to learn. Whether you're a seasoned player or picking up a volleyball for the first time, there's a place for you here.

Open to All Community-Driven Competitive Adeiso Proud
In Action

THE COURT IS HOME
